test-case.name: LoadsEachStoryAndSpawnsNodes
test-case.output: ShadowGuidedStoryPlayer: no snapshots assigned FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — A decision seals into a hash-chained, signed provenance chain. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: VERIFIED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Reason-code attestation binding — Two reason codes are selected, each bound to verified evidence. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED CLAIM_EVIDENCE_BINDING: VERIFIED DICTIONARY_HASH: VERIFIED DICTIONARY_VERSION: VERIFIED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED LEGAL_FAIRNESS_REVIEW: REQUIRES_HUMAN_REVIEW POLICY_ADEQUACY: NOT_EVALUATED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Persona deliberation → evidence-grounded synthesis — Five analytical perspectives read the same shared evidence. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED CLAIM_EVIDENCE_BINDING: VERIFIED HUMAN_APPROVAL: NOT_PRESENT LEGAL_FAIRNESS_REVIEW: REQUIRES_HUMAN_REVIEW PERSONA_OUTPUT_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: VERIFIED SYNTHESIS_PROVENANCE: VERIFIED

test-case.name: StepNextBackRestart_StayInBounds
test-case.output: ShadowGuidedStoryPlayer: no snapshots assigned FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — A decision seals into a hash-chained, signed provenance chain. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: VERIFIED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — Each link derives from the previous one, source through audit record. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: VERIFIED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — The recommendation is sealed by an Ed25519 signature into the audit record. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: VERIFIED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — Alter the council claim at sequence 3 and its verification fails first. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: FAILED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: FAILED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: FAILED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — Every downstream link is frozen as affected — a green chain would have proved only that the record was unaltered. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: FAILED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: FAILED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: FAILED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — Integrity is judged; analytical correctness is NOT evaluated by the chain. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: VERIFIED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — Integrity is judged; analytical correctness is NOT evaluated by the chain. test-case.name: SwitchingStories_RebuildsCleanly
test-case.output: ShadowGuidedStoryPlayer: no snapshots assigned FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — A decision seals into a hash-chained, signed provenance chain. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: VERIFIED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Reason-code attestation binding — Two reason codes are selected, each bound to verified evidence. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED CLAIM_EVIDENCE_BINDING: VERIFIED DICTIONARY_HASH: VERIFIED DICTIONARY_VERSION: VERIFIED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED LEGAL_FAIRNESS_REVIEW: REQUIRES_HUMAN_REVIEW POLICY_ADEQUACY: NOT_EVALUATED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Persona deliberation → evidence-grounded synthesis — Five analytical perspectives read the same shared evidence. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED CLAIM_EVIDENCE_BINDING: VERIFIED HUMAN_APPROVAL: NOT_PRESENT LEGAL_FAIRNESS_REVIEW: REQUIRES_HUMAN_REVIEW PERSONA_OUTPUT_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: VERIFIED SYNTHESIS_PROVENANCE: VERIFIED Saving results to: /private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-alexji-Desktop-vibex/cfb502a3-1a5c-4f60-a390-d756b56a18f1/scratchpad/playmode-results.xml
